overall.description: Third-person gameplay footage from Horizon Forbidden West showing Aloy exploring a snowy Tenakth settlement built on a mountain cliff. The character walks through the tribal village with distinctive purple crystalline structures, approaches a scenic overlook to interact with a seated companion, then returns through the settlement.

scene_state.functional_zone: tribal settlement with crystalline spires and wooden platforms

agents.ego_description: walking steadily through the snowy tribal settlement, passing villagers and crystalline structures

notable_agents.action: villager standing near wooden railing, observing the surroundings

entered.detail: tall purple and blue crystalline formations decorating the settlement
elevated wooden platforms and bridges connecting settlement areas
large wooden structure with thatched roof and decorative banners
snow-covered mountain peaks visible in the distance

segments.scene_description: Aloy walks through a snowy Tenakth settlement built on a mountainside, passing wooden walkways and distinctive purple crystalline spires. Villagers stand scattered around the area as the camera moves steadily forward through the village.

events.description: exiting the main settlement area onto a narrow cliffside path

agents.ego_description: walking along the cliff edge path toward a seated companion at the overlook

notable_agents.action: companion character sitting on a rock at the cliff edge, facing the mountain vista

entered.detail: narrow snowy path along the cliff edge with wooden railings
character sitting on a rock ledge overlooking the valley
rustic wooden arch marking the entrance to the overlook area

segments.scene_description: The path narrows as Aloy leaves the main settlement, walking along a snowy cliff edge toward a wooden archway. A companion sits on a rock ahead, overlooking the vast mountain valley, while the crystalline spires recede into the background.

scene_state.functional_zone: cliff edge overlook with panoramic mountain views

events.description: character stops walking and approaches the seated companion at the cliff edge
camera pans to reveal expansive snow-covered mountain valley and distant peaks

agents.ego_description: standing next to the seated companion, looking out at the mountain vista and gesturing toward the view

notable_agents.action: companion sitting on rock ledge, turning to look at Aloy and the view

entered.detail: expansive view of snow-covered mountains and forested valleys below
distant mountain peaks covered in snow and partially obscured by clouds

segments.scene_description: Aloy reaches the cliff edge overlook and stops beside the seated companion. They gaze out at the vast snow-covered mountain valley together as the camera pans to reveal the expansive vista of peaks, forests, and distant waterfalls.

events.description: character turns around and begins walking back toward the settlement

agents.ego_description: walking back through the settlement, passing the companion again and returning toward the village center

notable_agents.action: villager walking along the path carrying items

entered.detail: wooden settlement building with decorative banners and snow-covered roof
smoking fire pit with stones arranged around it

segments.scene_description: Aloy turns and walks back through the settlement, passing the seated companion once more. The path leads past the tribal longhouse and cooking fires as the character returns toward the village center, with the purple crystalline spires coming back into view.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement through a snowy Tenakth settlement that extends toward a breathtaking mountain overlook before returning to the village center. It begins with Aloy walking past wooden walkways and distinctive purple crystalline spires as villagers stand scattered throughout the mountainside base. As the path narrows, the camera follows her away from the main settlement along a snowy cliff edge toward a wooden archway, leaving the crystalline structures behind. The scene then opens into a vast vista of snow-covered peaks, forests, and distant waterfalls as Aloy stops beside a seated companion at the cliff's edge. Finally, the camera turns back toward the village, passing the companion and tribal longhouses with glowing cooking fires as the purple spires reappear in the distance.
